pi_items.source: Code analysis of export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for agent output.
Code analysis of export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for agent output.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh which copy the Muncie project into this directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the HEC-RAS Muncie example model (real data based on the White River in Indiana). The required output files must be placed at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/inundation_width.csv and /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/inundation_summary.txt. The HEC-RAS project directory is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie.
